result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:     AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH transfers AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    oldvalue__c AS from_agent,
    newvalue__c AS to_agent,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(oldvalue__c) <> ''
    AND btrim(newvalue__c) <> ''
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT btrim(from_agent) AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY btrim(from_agent)
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(newvalue__c) AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(newvalue__c) <> ''
),
agents_with_cases AS (
  SELECT agent_id
  FROM handled_agents
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT awc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agents_with_cases awc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = awc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, awc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH transfers AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    oldvalue__c AS from_agent,
    newvalue__c AS to_agent,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(oldvalue__c) <> ''
    AND btrim(newvalue__c) <> ''
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT btrim(from_agent) AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY btrim(from_agent)
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(newvalue__c) AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(newvalue__c) <> ''
),
agents_with_cases AS (
  SELECT agent_id
  FROM handled_agents
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT awc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agents_with_cases awc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = awc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, awc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH transfers AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    oldvalue__c AS from_agent,
    newvalue__c AS to_agent,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(oldvalue__c) <> ''
    AND btrim(newvalue__c) <> ''
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT btrim(from_agent) AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY btrim(from_agent)
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(newvalue__c) AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(newvalue__c) <> ''
),
agents_with_cases AS (
  SELECT agent_id
  FROM handled_agents
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT awc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agents_with_cases awc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = awc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, awc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH transfers AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    oldvalue__c AS from_agent,
    newvalue__c AS to_agent,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(oldvalue__c) <> ''
    AND btrim(newvalue__c) <> ''
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT btrim(from_agent) AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY btrim(from_agent)
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(newvalue__c) AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(newvalue__c) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH transfers AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    oldvalue__c AS from_agent,
    newvalue__c AS to_agent,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(oldvalue__c) <> ''
    AND btrim(newvalue__c) <> ''
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT btrim(from_agent) AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY btrim(from_agent)
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(newvalue__c) AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(newvalue__c) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"

ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
